speaker: Donald J. Trump
source_title: Remarks announcing TSMC's $100B U.S. investment (Roosevelt Room)
exact_quote: Today, Taiwan Semiconductor is announcing that they will be investing at least $100 billion in new capital in the United States over the next short period of time to build state-of-the-art semiconductor manufacturing facilities.
